name: Police Simulator | RPG
description:
Fulfill your duty to protect and serve. Become a regular patrol officer and deal with everyday crimes. Become a detective and solve mysteries, or become a SWAT Operative and deal in high risk situations. The choice is yours.

DISCLAIMER: The setting takes place in in a fictional city in the USA during modern times. If you wish to change the time and country please add it to your starting prompt.
creator: DogeMafia
